zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Blois-Champagne於1130年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Thibaut IV de Blois37歲，母親Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim22歲。她於1155年與Renaud II de Bar結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1207年8月7日在法國德 艾斯特芒內享年77歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特芒內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Blois-Champagne was born in 1130, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Thibaut IV de Blois, was 37 and her mother, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, was 22. She married Renaud II de Bar in 1155. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 7 August 1207, in Marne, Grand Est, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Marne, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Blois-Champagne est née en 1130, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Thibaut IV de Blois, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud II de Bar en 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1207, à Marne, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Marne, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Blois-Champagne 1130 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaut IV de Blois 37 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim 22. Sie hat 1155 Renaud II de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 7. August 1207 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Blois-Champagne(이)가 1130년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaut IV de Blois(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1155년 Renaud II de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1207년 8월 7일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Blois-Champagne родилась в 1130 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Thibaut IV de Blois было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Kärnten-Spanheim, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud II de Bar в 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 7 августа 1207 г. в местности марн, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности марн, гранд эст, Франция.
